word: H8251 - שִׁקּוּץ - shiqqûwts - shik-koots' - Abominable filth

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁקּץ שׁקּוּץ

Transliteration: shiqqûts shiqqûts

Phonetic: shik-koots'

BDB Definition:

  1. detestable thing or idol, abominable thing, abomination, idol, detested thing

Origin: from H8262

TWOT entry: 2459b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
